No words

If the moon could write poetry, it would borrow your quiet elegance.

If the dawn could choose a face, it would choose your smile.

And if kindness were given a human form, it would walk through the world looking a little like you.

Some people are beautiful because they are admired.
“You are beautiful because you make life itself feel a little more beautiful.”

Please accept it, Darling.🥹 🥺
